title: Woman’s battered body found in Limpopo: Boyfriend arrested
description: NATIONAL NEWS - A 55-year-old man, who has...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - A 55-year-old man, who has been charged with the murder of his girlfriend (34), is expected to appear in the Seshego Magistrate’s Court in Limpopo tomorrow.


> Polokwane Review reports that his girlfriend’s battered body, with multiple injuries, was found on a street in Moletjie in Ga-Chokoe village, early on Sunday morning.


Police spokesperson Colonel Malesela Ledwaba says officers were alerted just after 02:30 and rushed to the scene.

“The woman was certified dead on arrival, and a murder case was opened.”

A manhunt was launched for the woman’s boyfriend, who was identified as the prime suspect, and he was arrested yesterday morning in Ga-Mphela village, says Ledwaba.

The suspect remains in custody and will appear in the Seshego Magistrate’s Court tomorrow.

Article: Caxton Network News

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
